'''Nor Wedd''' was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] official who represented [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] after former [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Tikkes/Legends|Tikkes]] joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="AotC">{{Film|II}}</ref>

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Wedd served as one of the aides to Senator [[Tundra Dowmeia/Legends|Tundra Dowmeia]], along with [[Zil Topur/Legends|Zil Topur]].<ref name="DB">{{DB|species|quarren|Quarren}}</ref> When [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] announced the proposal of forming the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] to defend against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]], Nor Wedd, along with the rest of the delegation agreed to the Chancellor's proposal.<ref name="AotC" />
